event: Architectural design of an ornate fireplace
description: A detailed architectural engraving depicting an elaborate neoclassical fireplace design. The mantelpiece features Greek key patterns along the frieze, flanked by caryatid or sphinx-like supporting figures. Classical reliefs and medallions decorate the upper portion. Within the firebox, an ornate fire screen or back plate with a reclining figure is visible. The overall design is symmetrical and richly ornamented in the Piranesian manner, rendered in fine black and white line work.

_meta.title: Fireplace: frieze with ribbing and scrapers, and a Greek, a rich interior wing
